name: sensorQueuePsi5Frame
title: sensorQueuePsi5Frame
description: Inserts the given frame into the send queue of the given channel.

parameters.name: sysVarNamespace
parameters.description: The namespace of the channel the frame shall be queued in.

parameters.name: frame
parameters.description: Specifies the details of the frame that shall be inserted into the send queue.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
